data.title: Add Julianna Roberts to people directory with photo avatar badge as test case

data.body:
## Test case: Avatar badge with real photo

Add Julianna Roberts to the PEOPLE array and use as the first real photo avatar badge test.

**Person data:**
- Name: Julianna Roberts
- Twitter: @jannaaar
- Website: parallax.haus (use instead of Substack)
- Role: TBD (Jules to specify)
- Houses: TBD

**Photo (use the no-text/no-bg version as avatar):**
- Clean (no bg): /Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/2026-04-02/luna-lovegood-clean.png
- No bg version: /Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/2026-04-02/luna-lovegood-no-bg.png

NOTE: These are placeholder photos (Luna Lovegood from HP). Jules will provide her actual photo. The point is to test the avatar badge component with a real photo — name overlay at bottom, role/description text below, pinned-photo card frame. Should match the badge template at:
/Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/2026-04-02/home - avatar badge single.png

Replace 'Luna Lovegood' with 'Julianna Roberts', 'An eccentric Ravenclaw Student...' with her actual role/bio.
Review pass. One PEOPLE entry added with correct fields (id, name, role, houses, socials, avatar). Avatar image present at 272KB. Twitter handle without @, website with https. TypeScript clean.
